## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build && npm test && npm run lint` pass locally
- [ ] Added/updated a test in `tests/*.test.ts` for the behavior change
- [ ] If this touches selection or safe-mode logic: confirmed it cannot introduce a false
      negative (a test that should run but doesn't get selected)
- [ ] README updated if flags, behavior, or the Action interface changed
